name: S-102
events: 10 Jan 1942 S-102 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 2000 tons north of the Persfjord in position 70°30'N, 30°55'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

14 Jan 1942 S-102 torpedoed and sank the German merchant T?rkheim (1877 GRT, former Swedish Fagervik) off the Syltefjord in position 70°37'N, 30°32'E. The submarine was damaged in the counter attack by the German escort vessels but was able to remain on patrol.
18 Aug 1943 S-102 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 tons off the Tanafjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
26 Aug 1943 S-102 fires two torpedoes against a German convoy off the Tanafjord. Both torpedoes missed their target.
20 Jan 1944 S-102 fires four torpedoes against a German convoy off the Laksfjord. All four torpedoes missed their target.
24 Oct 1944 S-102 fired torpedoes against a German convoy off the Kongsfjord. All torpedoes fired missed their target(s).
